title: astragalus unilocularis
intro: Astragalus unilocularis, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus unilocularis include reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the body's ability to fight off infections. Astragalus unilocularis is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
